description: CompositionChampagne coloured strapless evening gown made of 94% polyester and 6% elastane, has a ruched neckline with gathers at the bust and back, light boning in the bust area for better structure, extended panel with bead detailing that can be tied around the neck in a choer-style, and has a concelaed zipper with a metal hook-loop closure on the sideFittingRegularWash care Cold hand wash inside out separately Do not soak, bleach or tumble dry Roll in towel to remove excess moisture Dry flat in shade Cool iron on reverse side Do not iron embellishments Do not dry clean If you want to look as elegant as you feel try this champagne coloured strapless evening gown from forever new. With a glorious flowy material that makes you look slim, and bead detailing, you will be the centre of attention at any formal do. Team this with nude stilettos and delicate earrings to drip with of sophistication. Model statisticsThe model wears size M in dressesHeight-5.9", Chest-33"
